message:
feat(dolt): add server identity verification and restart command

Prevent Dolt server hijacking where another process (e.g., bd embedded
Dolt) takes over port 3307 with a different data directory, serving
empty/wrong databases instead of the real ones.

Changes:
- Add gt dolt restart command: stop + kill imposters + start correct server
- Add VerifyServerDataDir(): checks --data-dir flag on running process
- Add KillImposters(): kills dolt sql-server on configured port with wrong data-dir
- Modify Start() to detect/kill imposters before returning already running
- Add periodic identity check to daemon health loop (every 5 min)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -529,6 +529,7 @@ func newTestManager(t *testing.T) *DoltServerManager {
 		logger:           func(format string, v ...interface{}) { t.Logf(format, v...) },
 		runningFn:        func() (int, bool) { return 0, false },
 		healthCheckFn:    func() error { return nil },
+		identityCheckFn:  func() error { return nil },
 		startFn:          func() error { return nil },
 		stopFn:           func() {},
 		unhealthyAlertFn: func(error) {},
